5DH_DCDC_DELTA_S1S_S1M_v1.8

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DADDF1
Recv ID: 18DAF1DD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: DD
Func Name: Superviseur-DCDC_29b
